sentences.arabic: أَظُنُّ أَنَّ الزِّيَارَةَ الشَّخْصِيَّةَ أَحْسَنُ مِنَ الرِّسَالَةِ.
sentences.translation: Mislim da je osobna posjeta bolja od poruke.
sentences.translationEn: I think that a personal visit is better than a message.

sentences.arabic: حِينَ تَزُورُ شَخْصًا يَشْعُرُ بِالِاهْتِمَامِ الْحَقِيقِيِّ.
sentences.translation: Kada posjetiš nekoga, on osjeća pravu pažnju.
sentences.translationEn: When you visit someone they feel genuine care.

sentences.arabic: الرَّسَائِلُ مُفِيدَةٌ لَكِنَّهَا لَا تُغْنِي عَنِ اللِّقَاءِ.
sentences.translation: Poruke su korisne ali ne mogu zamijeniti susret.
sentences.translationEn: Messages are useful but they cannot replace meeting in person.

sentences.translation: Redovito posjećujem svoju rodbinu i prijatelje.
sentences.translationEn: I visit my relatives and friends regularly.
